options.name: -budgets
options.description: This will set budgeting mode options via setBudgetingMode command for accurate or preliminary budgeting whichever is specified. It has lower precedence than other user specified budgeting mode settings.

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Displays the current settings in Tcl list format only

options.name: -nonDefault
options.description: Displays the current settings which are not default settings
